case_title: SIGNATURE WIRELESS GROUP VS TRANS METRO EXPRESS, INC.

docket_entries.description: NOTE:TOLD PRO.SRVR WRIT COULD NOT BE ISSUED UNTIL 4/28,IF NO OPPOSITION.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS METRO EXPRESS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIGNATURE WIRELESS GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRANS METRO EXPRESS, INC. $844.59 PRINCIPAL, $114.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $959.09 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,158.13 AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS METRO EXPRESS, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $11.04 ACCRUED INTEREST, $140.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS METRO EXPRESS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $844.59 FILED BY SIGNATURE WIRELESS GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS METRO EXPRESS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS METRO EXPRESS, INC.
